SEARCH
Package clientGui.user

Class UpdateProfileController

java.lang.Object
clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator
clientGui.user.UpdateProfileController
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageListener<Object>, BaseController
public class UpdateProfileController extends MainNavigator implements MessageListener<Object>
Controller for the Update Profile screen. Allows subscribers to update their personal information.

  • Method Details

    • initData

      public void initData(ClientUi clientUi, Customer customer)
      Initializes the controller with the customer's data.
      Parameters:
      clientUi - The client UI instance
      customer - The customer object to be updated

    • saveChanges

      void saveChanges(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Saves the changes made to the profile. Validates input and sends an update request to the server.
      Parameters:
      event - The action event

    • goBack

      void goBack(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Navigates back to the Subscriber Option screen.
      Parameters:
      event - The action event
